subject: Future Trunks in Super Saiyan form, charging forward with glowing energy aura and a drawn sword
description: A spiky-haired figure in a dark jacket crouches in an aggressive forward stance, enveloped in a blazing golden-yellow energy aura. A long sword is clearly visible in hand, raised and ready to strike. The background is consumed by the aura's light, suggesting immense power being channeled. The figure's expression is intense and focused. The anime linework and energy-burst style are consistent with the Dragon Ball Super card art register.
foreground: armored jacket-wearing fighter in aggressive crouch, sword drawn, golden aura blazing
background: explosive golden energy light consuming the frame
